Mermaid UI 时序图绘制工具
Using MermaidUI improves drawing efficiency by 1000% compared to traditional drawing tools, and by 300% compared to manually writing Mermaid code.
低码工坊（Lowcode Studio）是一个低代码软件工作室，持续探索和研究低代码技术开发复杂业务应用。
Lowcode Studio is a low code software studio that continuously explores and researches low code technologies for developing complex business applications.

When discussing technical solutions in meetings, there is no longer a rush to update the sequence diagram. Instead, the WYSIWYG enhanced configuration plan allows the team's discussion to be presented immediately in the meeting.
Real time generation of graphics and Mermaid code based on UI configuration, which can be easily copied to any of your private Markdown technical documents with just one click.
注册成为会员，解锁更多特性
最多仅能选2个，请选起始对象和结束对象
使用本工具绘制时序图相比传统绘图工具提升1000%绘图效率，相比手写Mermaid代码提升300%绘图效率。
基于mermaid实现的一个时序图可视化配置增强工具，动动鼠标即可完成时序图的绘制，并生成Mermaid代码，可粘贴到任意支持mermaid代码的markdown文档中。
根据UI配置实时生成图形和Mermaid代码，可一键复制到您的任意私有Markdown技术文档中。
Sign up to unlock more features
Only select a maximum of 2, please choose the starting and ending participants
开会讨论技术方案时，不再手忙脚乱的更新时序图，所见即所得的增强配置方案，让团队的讨论在会议中立即呈现。

A visualization configuration enhancement tool for sequence diagrams implemented based on Mermaid. By simply clicking the mouse, you can complete the drawing of a sequence diagram and generate Mermaid code, which can be pasted into any Markdown document that supports Mermaid code.
2. Reverse parsing and importing of Mermaid code
